name: whatsapp-rulett-worker
description: Worker que consume WhatsappQueue y envía mensajes vía Meta Graph API

scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && npm run db:setup
scripts.db:schema:docker: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U rulett_admin -d rulett_db -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/02-schema.sql
scripts.db:seed:sql: docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U rulett_admin -d rulett_db -f - < sql/seed.sql
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:up && npm run db:schema && npm run db:seed
